name: Cheese Popovers
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:10
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except the shredded cheddar cheese.
2. Beat the mixture at a low speed of an electric mixer until it is smooth.
3. Stir in the shredded cheddar cheese.
4. Place well-greased muffin pans into a preheated 425°F (220°C) oven for 3 minutes, or until a drop of water sizzles when placed in them.
5. Remove the pans from the oven and fill them about halfway with batter.
6. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 15 minutes.
7. Reduce the temperature to 350°F (175°C) and continue baking for an additional 18 to 20 minutes.
8. Serve immediately.
Yield: 1 dozen popovers
NOTE: Popovers bake into crispy, hollow shells that can be enjoyed on their own or filled with sweet or savory sauces. Once in the oven, they rise significantly above the muffin pans due to being leavened by eggs and steam created during the initial high-temperature baking process. Avoid opening the oven door while they are baking to ensure proper rising.
